view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a simple online booking page as evidenced by the successful booking of appointments by customers. The linked use case clearly states the need for a simple online booking page, and the evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step shows that a customer was able to book a primary offer, confirming the functionality of the booking page. Additionally, the booking details include necessary elements such as confirmed status and payment collection, which further supports the requirement being met.
